title: Loan Interviewers and Clerks
description: Interview loan applicants to elicit information; investigate applicants' backgrounds and verify references; prepare loan request papers; and forward findings, reports, and documents to appraisal department. Review loan papers to ensure completeness, and complete transactions between loan establishment, borrowers, and sellers upon approval of loan.

tasks.text: Verify and examine information and accuracy of loan application and closing documents.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assemble and compile documents for loan closings, such as title abstracts, insurance forms, loan forms, and tax receipts.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Record applications for loan and credit, loan information, and disbursements of funds, using computers.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Submit loan applications with recommendation for underwriting approval.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Contact customers by mail, telephone, or in person concerning acceptance or rejection of applications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Contact credit bureaus, employers, and other sources to check applicants' credit and personal references.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Check value of customer collateral to be held as loan security.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Interview loan applicants to obtain personal and financial data and to assist in completing applications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare and type loan applications, closing documents, legal documents, letters, forms, government notices, and checks, using computers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Review customer accounts to determine whether payments are made on time and that other loan terms are being followed.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Calculate, review, and correct errors on interest, principal, payment, and closing costs, using computers or calculators.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Answer questions and advise customers regarding loans and transactions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Present loan and repayment schedules to customers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Order property insurance or mortgage insurance policies to ensure protection against loss on mortgaged property.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Schedule and conduct closings of mortgage transactions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Establish credit limits and grant extensions of credit on overdue accounts.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
